overview: Set in 1274 during the Mongol invasion of Tsushima Island, you play as Jin Sakai, a samurai who must abandon traditional honor to become the 'Ghost' and use unconventional tactics to save his homeland.
coreMechanics: Stance system (Stone, Water, Wind, Moon) - each effective against different enemy types
Perfect parry and dodge timing for combat advantage
Ghost weapons (kunai, smoke bombs, sticky bombs) for stealth
Resolve system (build by combat, spend on healing or special moves)
Samurai vs Ghost playstyle choice affects story perception

terminology.Jin Sakai: The main protagonist, samurai of Clan Sakai
terminology.The Ghost: Jin's alter ego using stealth and fear tactics
terminology.Resolve: Resource for healing and powerful techniques
terminology.Stance: Combat style - switch based on enemy weapon type
terminology.Guiding Wind: Environmental navigation system pointing to objectives
terminology.Legend: Jin's reputation level affecting unlock progression
terminology.Bamboo Strike: Timed button sequence for resolve upgrade

commonQuestions: Which stance should I use against this enemy?
How do I increase my health?
What's the difference between samurai and ghost playstyle?
Where do I find technique points?
How does the guiding wind work?
Should I do standoffs or stealth kills?
How do I unlock new sword techniques?
insiderTips: Stone stance for swordsmen, Water for shields, Wind for spears, Moon for brutes
Perfect parry timing is slightly earlier than you expect - watch enemy shoulders, not weapon
Stealth kills don't reduce honor or affect story - play how you want
Visit hot springs for max health upgrades - essential for boss fights
Bamboo strikes permanently increase resolve capacity - prioritize these
Guiding wind can target multiple waypoints - use touchpad to cycle
Standoffs can chain multiple kills if timed perfectly - wait for glint

progressionSystem.combatUpgrades: Technique points from missions and exploration
progressionSystem.gear: Armor and charms from vendors and exploration
progressionSystem.weapons: Unlock ghost weapons from specific quests

combatTypes.ghost: Stealth assassinations, ghost weapons, fear tactics
